claimText: The Dadasaheb Phalke Award is a part of the National Film Awards and is presented by the President of India.
evidenceExcerpt: It is part of the National Film Awards, a highly coveted collection of honours in the film industry... The President of India presents the award.
examUse: Statement-based question on the administration and presentation of the Dadasaheb Phalke Award.
distractorHooks: Presented by the Prime Minister of India
Presented by the Minister of Information and Broadcasting
It is an independent award separate from the National Film Awards

claimText: The Dadasaheb Phalke Award was instituted by the government in 1969, and its first recipient was Devika Rani Roerich.
evidenceExcerpt: The award was instituted by the government in 1969... The first recipient of the award was Devika Rani Roerich in 1969.
examUse: Statement-based or correct-pair question on the history of Indian cinema awards.
distractorHooks: Instituted in 1954 along with the Bharat Ratna

claimText: Dhundiraj Govind Phalke is credited with giving India its first film, 'Raja Harishchandra', in 1913.
evidenceExcerpt: The Award is named after Dhundiraj Govind Phalke, the pioneering filmmaker who gave India its first film- 'Raja Harishchandra', in 1913.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origins of Indian cinema.
distractorHooks: Alam Ara was India's first film

claimText: The Dadasaheb Phalke Award consists of a 'Swarna Kamal', a cash prize of Rs 10 lakh, a certificate, a silk roll, and a shawl.
evidenceExcerpt: The award... consists of a 'Swarna Kamal', a cash prize of Rs 10 lakh, a certificate, a silk roll, and a shawl.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the specific components of the award.

claimText: The movie '12th Fail', directed by Vidhu Vinod Chopra, won the Best Feature Film award.
evidenceExcerpt: Best Feature Film Movie: 12th Fail Director: Vidhu Vinod Chopra
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on recent film awards and their directors.
distractorHooks: Won Best Popular Film Providing Wholesome Entertainment instead of Best Feature Film
